properties.name: data-api.apis-path
properties.description: Classpath path for YAML API definition files. Supports recursive scanning of subdirectories.

properties.name: data-api.global-timeout
properties.description: Global query timeout in milliseconds. Overridden by per-API sla.timeout in YAML definitions.

properties.name: data-api.capabilities-enabled
properties.description: Whether to expose the /capabilities endpoint listing all registered APIs.

properties.name: data-api.scope-mapping
properties.description: Maps caller identities to scope tiers. Format: 'callerId:scope1+scope2+...,callerId2:scope3'. Used by ConfigScopeResolver.

properties.name: data-api.auth-type
properties.description: Authentication mode: 'none' (trust all, read X-Caller-Id header), 'jwt' (HMAC256 Bearer tokens), or 'apikey' (X-API-Key header).

properties.name: data-api.auth.strict-scopes
properties.description: When true, requests without a matching scope return empty rows instead of all non-sensitive fields.

properties.name: data-api.jwt-secret
properties.description: HMAC256 secret for JWT verification. Required when auth-type is 'jwt'.

properties.name: data-api.api-keys
properties.description: Comma-separated list of valid API keys. Required when auth-type is 'apikey'. Keys are matched against the X-API-Key header.

properties.name: data-api.rate-limit-enabled
properties.description: Whether to enforce per-API, per-caller rate limiting using a token bucket algorithm.

properties.name: data-api.jdbc.fetch-size
properties.description: JDBC statement fetch size for query result streaming. Set to 0 to use the driver default.
